system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonkho_theogia_getinout","body":"
CREATE PROC TR_TONKHO_THEOGIA_GETINOUT
(
    @tungay date,
    @denngay date
)
AS
select a.makho
	, b.mact
	, SUM(b.soluong) soluong_nhap
	, SUM(B.soluong * B.dongia) thanhtien_nhap
	, b.dongia as dongia_nhap
into #tblNhap
from tr_phieunhap a
    inner join tr_phieunhap_vattu_theogia b on a.sopn = b.sopn
where a.active = 1
	--and MONTH(a.ngaynhap) = @thang
	--and YEAR(a.ngaynhap) = @nam
	and a.ngaynhap > @tungay
	and a.ngaynhap < @denngay
group by a.makho, b.mact, b.dongia


select a.makho
	, ISNULL(c.mact, b.mact) mact
	, SUM(ISNULL(c.soluong, b.soluong)) soluong_xuat
	, SUM(ISNULL(c.soluong, b.soluong) * ISNULL(c.dongia, d.dongia)) thanhtien_xuat
	, ISNULL(c.dongia, d.dongia) dongia_xuat
into #tblXuat
from tr_phieuxuat a 
	inner join tr_ctphieuxuat b on a.sopx = b.phieuxuat
	left join tr_phieuxuat_vattu_theogia c on b.phieuxuat = c.sopx and b.mact = c.mact
	left join tr_material d on b.mact = d.mavt
where a.active = 1
	--and MONTH(a.ngaytao) = @thang
	--and YEAR(a.ngaytao) = @nam
	and a.ngaytao > @tungay
	and a.ngaytao < @denngay
group by a.makho, ISNULL(c.mact, b.mact), ISNULL(c.dongia, d.dongia)


SELECT ISNULL(A.makho, B.makho) makho
    , ISNULL(A.mact, B.mact) mact
    , C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt
    , A.soluong_nhap, A.dongia_nhap, A.thanhtien_nhap
    , B.soluong_xuat, B.dongia_xuat, B.thanhtien_xuat
FROM #tblNhap A
    FULL JOIN #tblXuat B ON A.makho = B.makho AND A.mact = B.mact
    INNER JOIN tr_material C ON ISNULL(A.mact, B.mact) = C.mavt
--ORDER BY ISNULL(A.mact, B.mact)


DROP TABLE #tblNhap
DROP TABLE #tblXuat
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_phieunhap","dbo.tr_phieunhap_vattu_theogia","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_phieuxuat_vattu_theogia"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
